# OutClaw AI — LLM Interface

> The AI Newsletter With Claws. Weekly deep-dives on AI releases, agentic workflows, and the alpha your feed buries.

## Core Navigation
- [Home](https://outclaw.xyz/) — Newsletter landing page and weekly ticker.
- [About](https://outclaw.xyz/about/) — Mission and story of OutClaw AI.
- [Guides](https://outclaw.xyz/guides/) — Technical step-by-step playbooks.
- [Videos](https://outclaw.xyz/videos/) — Embedded YouTube video tutorials and deep-dives.
- [Tools](https://outclaw.xyz/tools/) — Free AI utilities for practitioners.
- [Newsletter](https://outclaw.xyz/newsletter/) — Subscribe for weekly updates.

## Technical Guides (Documentation)
- [Automate Content Workflow with n8n + Claude](https://outclaw.xyz/guides/automate-content-workflow-n8n-claude.html) — Build a full pipeline for ideation, drafting, and SEO.
- [Claude Sonnet 4.6 Prompting Playbook](https://outclaw.xyz/guides/claude-sonnet-prompting-playbook.html) — 30+ templates for XML structuring and CoT.
- [OpenClaw Setup Guide (VPS & MacMini)](https://outclaw.xyz/guides/openclaw-vps-mac-mini-setup-guide.html) — Self-hosting instructions for agentic systems.
- [GPT-5.4 1M Context Practical Guide](https://outclaw.xyz/guides/gpt-54-1m-context-practical-guide.html) — Use cases for massive context windows.

## Free Practitioner Tools
- [AI Brand Identity Builder](https://outclaw.xyz/tools/brand-identity.html) — Generate voice, tone, and strategy documents.
- [Prompt Sharpener](https://outclaw.xyz/tools/prompt-sharpener.html) — Refine and structure LLM prompts for better results.
- [Model Comparison Cheatsheet](https://outclaw.xyz/tools/model-comparison.html) — Real-time stats on the latest LLMs.
- [API Cost Calculator](https://outclaw.xyz/tools/api-cost-calculator.html) — Estimate model usage costs across Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini.
- [MCP Server Directory](https://outclaw.xyz/tools/mcp-server-directory.html) — A curated list of Model Context Protocol servers.

## Professional Skills (Quick Guides)
- [Organic Marketing Blitz](https://outclaw.xyz/skills/organic-marketing-blitz/) — 12-channel organic growth system.
- [Google Dorking for OSINT](https://outclaw.xyz/skills/google-dorking/) — Advanced search operators for data retrieval.
- [pSEO Indexing Setup](https://outclaw.xyz/skills/pseo-indexing-setup/) — Technical stack for programmatic SEO indexing.
- [Resume-Cover Letter & Role Map Claude Skill](https://outclaw.xyz/skills/resume-coverletter-skill/) — ATS-optimized resume and cover letter systems.
- [HyperFrames Video Production](https://outclaw.xyz/skills/hyperframes/) — Programmatic video generation with HTML, CSS, and JS.

## Content Pillars
- **Agentic Workflows**: MCP (Model Context Protocol) and autonomous systems.
- **Model Releases**: Benchmarks and analysis of Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini.
- **Prompt Engineering**: Technical patterns like XML and Chain-of-Thought (CoT).
- **Tooling Reviews**: Technical deep-dives into n8n, LangChain, and Promptfoo.

## Meta
- Frequency: Weekly (Every Tuesday)
- Target: AI Practitioners, Developers, and Systems Builders.
- URL Structure: Clean HTML endpoints for high crawlability.
